experience.title: Math Tutor
bullets: Provide individualized instruction in Algebra, Precalculus, and Calculus; adapt explanations to diverse learning styles.
Break down complex problems into clear, structured steps and track progress over time.
Communicate performance updates to parents and supervisors.

experience.title: Front End Web Development Intern
bullets: Shipped two production Jira tickets to bathandbodyworks.com as part of an Agile team, participating in sprint planning, standups, estimation, and reviews
Refactored homepage modules from carousel layouts to overflow scroll using HTML, CSS (flexbox), and JavaScript within an established modular design system
Resolved a cross-browser UX bug where Mac trackpad gestures triggered unintended browser navigation, using a mousewheel event listener to clamp scroll behavior
Implemented scroll interaction analytics tracking via window._satellite.track to capture engagement data for cross-team reporting
Referenced Figma design files throughout development and collaborated with the UX/FEWD team through design system workshops and component reviews
Partnered with QA through UAT and regression testing cycles before each release, working within Salesforce Commerce Cloud

experience.title: Camp Counselor
bullets: Led and supervised a group of 15 campers in a fast-paced, team-based environment, ensuring safety, engagement, and inclusion.
Planned and adapted daily activities to accommodate different personalities, energy levels, and accessibility needs.
Resolved interpersonal conflicts and communicated effectively with staff and parents to support positive experiences.
